_readme: UK free-to-air broadcaster for each WC2026 match, keyed by openfootball match number (the `num` field in worldcup.json). Source of truth for the index.html fixtures panel's 'on TV in the UK' line. There is NO open feed that carries this; it is curated from the BBC/ITV confirmations (broadcastnow.co.uk / live-footballontv.com / per-match how-to-watch listings). BBC & ITV share the 104 matches and both show the final. Update when broadcasters confirm later rounds: QF (97-100) confirmed 8 Jul — note ITV took 3 of the 4 (97/99/100), BBC just 98, so it is NOT a 2/2 split; SF (101-102) and 3rd place (103) stay 'TBC' until announced. Channel 'TBC' renders a muted 'UK channel TBC' hint; a missing entry renders nothing. Keep `num` keys as strings.
source: BBC/ITV Round-of-32 + Round-of-16 + Quarter-final confirmations (broadcastnow.co.uk, live-footballontv.com, satandpcguy.com, sportgrill.co.uk broadcast-picks announcements, per-match ESPN/Goal/SportsMole how-to-watch listings, July 2026)
